reviews.comment:
La estación muy poco mantenida. Los baños impresentables. Justo llegue 13.50 de un domingo y los empleados se querían ir antes del cambio de turno que era a las 14 y los que entraban no querían empezar antes. 15 minutos esperando con una cola terrible para cargar nafta y una mujer con un problema de salud que necesitaba combustible para llegar a la Clínica en Mar del Plata. Un desastre.

(Translated by Google)
The station is very poorly maintained. The bathrooms are unpresentable. I arrived at 1:50 p.m. on a Sunday, and the employees wanted to leave before the 2:00 p.m. shift change, and those arriving didn't want to start early. I had to wait 15 minutes in a terrible line to get gas, and a woman with a health problem needed fuel to get to the clinic in Mar del Plata. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPaThTeUV3EAE
